name: Fettucini Florentine
recipeInstructions:
1. Reduce the heavy cream to 1 1/2 cups.
2. Heat the butter in a large skillet.
3. Sauté the prosciutto for 1 minute.
4. Add the cream and chopped spinach, cooking until thick enough to coat a spoon.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Stir in the Parmesan cheese.
7. Cook the pasta according to package directions until al dente.
8. Drain the pasta and toss with the sauce. Serve immediately.
